subcodes.title: Lawh-i-Liqa'
subcodes.first_line: Lo, We made this epistle to be the attainment of Our presence for such as have turned unto God in these days
subcodes.first_line_orig: هذا کتاب جعلناه لقائنا للذین اقبلوا الی الله فی تلک الایام التی فیها تغیرت
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @presence [liqa'] of Manifestation of God is presence of God, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @spiritual prerequisites of teaching the Cause
